testcase.name: save generated menu stores included IA analysis without analyzing again
blocked menu save tracks missing required fields
generate menu idea sends dietary profile to IA
dice filter selection and empty result are tracked
manual edit after generated IA idea clears included analysis and shows notice
analyze existing shows quota message when IA quota is exhausted
generate menu idea calls IA again after quota retry expires
roll dice restarts exhausted filter instead of showing exhausted message
generate menu idea shows daily limit message when daily quota is exhausted
roll dice tracks filter result and menu count
loads and saves dietary profile locally
generate menu idea asks IA to avoid saved menus and current form idea
generate menu idea shows token rate limit message when token quota is exhausted
ai menu generation failure tracks failed event
delete menu tracks deleted menu event
generate menu idea does not call IA while persisted quota retry is active
save menu stores local menu without analyzing it
generate menu idea shows request rate limit message when request quota is exhausted
opening menu card tracks meal type analysis state and inventory count
analyze existing saves estimated calories from IA analysis
generate menu idea does not call IA again while quota retry is active
generate menu idea fills form using selected meal type
clear message removes expired quota retry from ui state
starting form and changing meal type track creation intent without menu text
generate menu idea shows quota message when IA quota is exhausted
analyze pending menus uses one IA call and saves valid results
analyze existing tracks started and successful analysis events
generate menu idea increases local backoff when quota fails repeatedly
active quota retry refreshes when Pacific daily reset arrives without user interaction
starts with daily IA uses available
generate menu idea decreases daily IA uses
generate menu idea does not call IA when daily local uses are exhausted
